channel.title: Chai on Home Espresso Lab
channel.description: Recent content in Chai on Home Espresso Lab

item.title: What Is a Dirty Chai? The Espresso-Spiked Chai Latte Explained
item.description: A dirty chai is a chai latte with a shot of espresso added. The 'dirty' refers to the espresso 'dirtying' the spiced chai with coffee. Learn what a dirty chai is, where it came from, how it differs from a regular chai latte and a latte, plus caffeine, calories, variations, and how to order one anywhere.

item.title: Chai Latte Recipe — How to Make It at Home (Hot + Iced)
item.description: Make a perfect chai latte at home with this easy recipe. Includes homemade masala chai concentrate, hot and iced versions, and 8 variations — no coffee shop needed.

item.title: Dirty Chai Latte Recipe (Hot & Iced)
item.description: Learn how to make a dirty chai latte at home — hot or iced. This easy recipe combines bold espresso with spiced chai tea and steamed milk for the perfect drink.
